common.pom: Large scale meme participation ecosystem symbolism and sustained community recognition show strong shared meaning and cultural cohesion
common.vision: Unite people through SHIB identity internet culture and collective belief

comud.pom: Strong emotional identity active participation and long term community attachment suggest real vitality though coherence still depends on sustained momentum
comud.vision: A thriving SHIB community where people feel energized connected and included

equilibrium.pom: Trading liquidity token utility and ecosystem participation provide some real demand but speculative attention remains a major force behind ongoing value
equilibrium.vision: Balance speculative energy with ecosystem usage and broader community utility

guide.pom: The project maintains a branded ecosystem with visible products token roles and community coordination though direction still depends heavily on narrative momentum
guide.vision: Guide meme communities through an expanding ecosystem and shared narrative

success.pom: High brand recognition major exchange presence large holder interest and continued ecosystem expansion reflect durable visibility and traction
success.vision: Become the most iconic and enduring community led meme ecosystem in crypto

vow.pom: Shiba Inu is widely recognized as a meme driven crypto community with a strong shared identity visible across its ecosystem language and long running online participation
vow.vision: Grow a bold meme culture that feels fun global and community owned
